gt_sql: SELECT T1.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_type),T1.molecule_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR000' GROUP BY T1.atom_id, T2.bond_type
pred_sql: SELECT T1.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_type), T1.molecule_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR346' GROUP BY T1.atom_id, T1.molecule_id;
question: List out the atom id that belongs to the TR346 molecule and how many bond type can be created by this molecule?
